abort.no_devices_found: No Neewer WiFi lights were found on your network

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the light. Ensure it is on WiFi and not controlled by another app.
error.cannot_determine_client_ip: Could not determine the Home Assistant host IP for the light's subnet. Enter the client IP manually.
error.invalid_subnet: Invalid subnet. Use CIDR notation such as 192.168.103.0/24
error.no_devices_found: No Neewer WiFi lights were discovered. Enter a subnet below or try manual setup.

discover.title: Discover Neewer WiFi lights
discover.description: Scanning may take up to 30 seconds on large networks. If nothing is found, enter a subnet to scan (for example 192.168.103.0/24) and optionally the Home Assistant IP on that subnet.

data.client_ip: Home Assistant IP on that subnet (optional)

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Enter the light IP address. If the light is on a different subnet than Home Assistant, also enter the Home Assistant IP that can reach it.

data.client_ip: Home Assistant IP on that subnet (optional)
